description: Composition Grey denim shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with two button cuffs , a spread collar, buttoned placket, two patch pockets with button closures, stitch detailing and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Warm iron This Levi's cotton shirt traces a relaxed silhouette flattering all body shapes to make you look your casual best. This off-duty essential is a must-have for the modern urban male. Pair it with denims and suede shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6', chest 33& rdquo and shoulders 18"
